title: President

result_summary.note: Active + embarked only. Reserves are not observable.

result_summary.name: TTT Power Transition 2026
result_summary.description: Canonical TTT template locked 2026-04-05 after Map+Units finalization. 20 countries, 10x20 global hex grid, 2 tactical theaters (eastern_ereb, mashriq), 345 default units.

final_assessment:
Based on my assessment of Columbia's military situation in Q1 2026, here are my **3 TOP MILITARY PRIORITIES**:

## **PRIORITY 1: Reinforce Persian Gulf Theater Operations**
**What**: Strengthen naval and air assets in the Arabian Sea/Persian Gulf region to contain Persia's military capabilities and protect critical sea lanes.

**Why**: We are at war with Persia, and their 15 observable units are concentrated in the mashriq theater with strong air defenses protecting nuclear sites. Our current Arabian Sea presence (col_n_01 and col_n_02 carrier groups) needs enhanced coordination with ground-based air assets to maintain pressure and deterrence.

**Specific Actions**: Deploy col_a_13 (CVW embarked air wing) from col_n_09 to support Arabian Sea operations. Activate reserve strategic missile unit col_m_12 (Gulf theater strategic strike) to provide credible deterrent threat against Persian nuclear facilities.

## **PRIORITY 2: Strengthen European Theater Readiness**
**What**: Enhance forward-deployed capabilities in Eastern Europe to counter potential expansion of conflict and reassure NATO allies.

**Why**: With active war in the Persian Gulf, we must maintain credible deterrence in Europe where our col_a_05, col_a_06, col_a_07 air units and col_d_04 air defense are already deployed. European theater stability prevents multi-front conflict escalation.

**Specific Actions**: Activate reserve ground units col_g_09 (Poland V Corps HQ) and col_g_10 (Poland ABCT rotational) from reserve status to strengthen Eastern European presence. Deploy col_d_05 (PAC-3/THAAD Pacific forward) from reserve to reinforce European air defenses.

## **PRIORITY 3: Maintain Pacific Strategic Balance**
**What**: Preserve Pacific deterrent posture while managing Persian Gulf commitments to prevent opportunistic aggression by regional powers.

**Why**: Our Pacific naval assets (col_n_06, col_n_07, col_n_08) and embarked air units maintain critical presence near Formosa and in WestPac. Any reduction risks emboldening potential adversaries during our Middle East focus.

**Specific Actions**: Maintain current Pacific naval deployments unchanged and keep col_a_10 (Kadena air) and col_a_11 (Osan/Kunsan air) on embarked status for rapid deployment flexibility. Ensure col_m_06 and col_m_07 (Pacific SSBN units) remain in strategic patrol posture.

**Overall Strategic Intent**: Prosecute the Persian conflict decisively while maintaining global deterrent credibility and alliance commitments across all theaters.
